articles.title: Kalahandi Village Cries for Water as Administration Remains Silent Amid Heatwave - Kanak News Odisha
articles.full_text:
ଶୋଷିଲା ତୁନଗାଁ, ଶୋଇଛି ପ୍ରଶାସନ | ପାନୀୟଜଳ ପାଇଁ ହାହାକାର ସ୍ଥିତି
A severe drinking water crisis has triggered panic in Odisha’s Kalahandi district.
Villagers in Tungao are struggling daily for just a few drops of water amid unbearable summer heat.
Tungao village under Koksara block, home to more than 2,000 people across six hamlets, reportedly has no proper drinking water facility. Women are forced to stand in long queues for hours near tube wells to collect water for their families.
Despite government claims of providing safe drinking water to every village, locals allege that the administration has completely ignored their suffering. The heartbreaking visuals from the village highlight the harsh reality of rural Odisha during peak summer.
